name: 7q22_q31_recurrent_region
description: 7q22-q31 region with several SD blocks that mediate recurrent rearrangements including 7q22.1 microdeletion and the 7q31.2 CFTR-region rearrangements seen in some cystic-fibrosis structural alleles. Less penetrant than 7q11.23 but recognised SD hotspot.

architecture.internal_structure: Multiple SD clusters along 7q22-q31 including GTF2IRD2-paralog containing blocks and KCTD7-region duplicons; CFTR (7q31.2) flanked by smaller SDs that mediate rare structural rearrangements.
